overview: A mobile-first taxi booking vendor app where vendors register and submit bookings, admin reviews and approves applications, and all parties can view booking and driver details.
features: Vendor signup with document uploads (driving licence, Aadhaar card, RC book)
Admin approval before vendors can login
Booking creation with city autocomplete (pickup/drop), date, time, driver earning, commission
Booking types: One Way, Round Trip, Local
Admin panel: manage applications, view all bookings, create bookings, manage facilities
Driver details view with clickable WhatsApp and mobile contact links
